hero.title: Car Wash Management Made Simple
hero.subtitle: Streamline your car wash operations with powerful tools for orders, clients, branches, and analytics. Start your free trial today.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Car Wash
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed specifically for car wash businesses

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Track orders from booking to completion. Manage scheduling, work posts, and service assignments with ease.

clients.title: Client Database
clients.description: Build lasting relationships with a complete client and vehicle database. Track history, preferences, and contact info.

branches.title: Multi-Branch Support
branches.description: Manage multiple locations from a single dashboard. Each branch has its own schedule, staff, and work posts.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Make data-driven decisions with revenue reports, order trends, and performance metrics across all branches.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: Manage employees, roles, and permissions. Track workforce efficiency and schedule shifts across branches.

booking.title: Online Booking
booking.description: Let customers book services online with a branded booking page. Configurable time slots and availability.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Automatic work post assignment, conflict prevention, and workforce capacity tracking. No double-bookings ever.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Fine-grained access control with 47 permissions across 14 modules. Each team member sees only what they need.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.description: Full history of every action — who changed what and when. Stay compliant and resolve disputes with confidence.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to digitize your car wash

register.title: Create an Account
register.description: Sign up with your company name and email. Your workspace is ready instantly — no setup calls or demos required.

configure.title: Configure Your Business
configure.description: Add branches, work posts, services, and invite your team. Set working hours, prices, and booking rules.

launch.title: Start Taking Orders
launch.description: Accept bookings from your dashboard or share your public booking page with customers. Track everything in real time.

stats.title: Built for Real Car Wash Operations

cta.title: Ready to Modernize Your Car Wash?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of car wash businesses already using WashFlow. Start your free 30-day trial — no credit card needed.

pricing.title: Start Free, Scale When Ready
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Get full access to all features during your 30-day trial.
pricing.trialDetails: Up to {{users}} users, {{branches}} branches, {{workPosts}} work posts, and {{services}} services
